response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned the entire video from 00:00 to 05:00. 2. Audited the audio track specifically for vocal music. 3. Confirmed the audio consists entirely of conversational speech and no music is present.
response.global_summary: This video is a conversational livestream segment featuring a VTuber (Ookami Mio) discussing food preferences with her audience during the hot summer weather. There is no vocal music present in this segment.
